violations.text: Establishment is lacking a written allergen statement on the printed menus. Establishment is to add a written statement indicating that consumers shall notify staff if they have any food allergies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Mignonette sauce was observed held past its disposition date. Food items prepared within the establishment shall be disposed of after 7 days including the day of preparation. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to add an indicating symbol to menu that indicated which items are available raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the following units: -Salad Prep Unit -Raw Bar Prep Unit -Cookline Prep Unit #1 -1-Door Reach-In Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the shelf in the cook ware storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the upstairs ice machine and deli slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The floor tiles in the cookline area were observed cracked or missing and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (00) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. Establishment had wrong Chemical hooked up to 3 bay sink. Chemical was switched out and retested (200ppm) Low Temp Chlorine sanatizer located at lower-level bar was reading (00) ppm. Chemical was observed to be out. Employee change sanatizer and it was retested (50 ppm) was observed after new btl was installed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Potato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Ice machines upstairs were observed to have an accumulation of unidentifiable black substance. Ice machines need to be cleaned and cleaned on a frequent basis. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Items on menu that are served raw or under cooked or are high risk for allergens need to have an asterisk next to food item alerting consumer to advisory. English Consumer Advisory Information Poster New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the celling in cook line area and in dishroom area was observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Areas need to be cleaned more frequently. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The Tile flooring by the drain near dish machine and entrance to cook line area was observed to be cracked and broken. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
